sections.title: Technique
sections.default: PA and lateral views of the {laterality} wrist were obtained.

sections.title: Findings
sections.normal_text: No fracture or dislocation is identified. The distal radius and ulna are intact. The carpal bones appear normal in size, shape and alignment. The radiocarpal and intercarpal joint spaces are maintained. No periarticular soft tissue swelling is identified.

sections.title: Impression
sections.normal_text: No fracture or significant radiological abnormality of the {laterality} wrist.

few_shot_normal.input: wrist bones intact, joints normal, no fracture

output.findings: No fracture or dislocation is identified. The distal radius and ulna are intact. The carpal bones appear normal in size, shape and alignment. The radiocarpal and intercarpal joint spaces are maintained. No periarticular soft tissue swelling.
output.impression: No fracture or significant radiological abnormality of the wrist.
